policy_summary: The Cabinet approved a Rs 25,938 crore Production Linked Incentive scheme for Auto and Auto Components. The scheme provides incentives of 13 to 18 percent on incremental sales for EVs and hydrogen vehicles.
key_change: Approval of PLI scheme with Rs 25,938 crore outlay for EVs and Hydrogen fuel cells.

stocks.name: Tata Motors
stocks.label: Strong Positive
stocks.reason: Direct beneficiary of PLI incentives given aggressive EV portfolio expansion.

stocks.name: Mahindra & Mahindra
stocks.label: Strong Positive
stocks.reason: Boost to EV SUV lineup through 13-18% incremental sales incentive.

analyst_brief: The Cabinet's Rs 25,938 crore PLI scheme is a massive structural tailwind for the domestic automobile sector, specifically targeting EV adoption. Tata Motors and Mahindra & Mahindra are the prime beneficiaries, poised to leverage the 13-18% sales incentives for their electric portfolios. This marks a definitive shift towards clean mobility, significantly re-rating auto OEMs with mature EV pipelines.
